violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Pizza prep table cooler has products temping at 45-51 degrees F. Service as needed.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Particle board shelving in walk in cooler. Not sealed. Used for raw chicken storage shelves. Gasket to 2 door reach in cooler damaged and needs repair.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Filters missing from hood system over pizza ovens.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a debris under shelving units and equipment in kitchen areas and walk in cooler and need detail cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Kitchen floor coating covering tiles peeling/damaged. Walk in cooler floor rusty. Not maintained in good repair or easily cleanable.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
